name: Defense & Aerospace Sector
summary: Day 76. **C3 DEFENSE DE-RATING IN MOTION — Lockheed Martin $519.94 (-0.2% 1D, -15.0% 1M, -19.5% 3M)**: the -15% 1M is the **single largest move in the bellwether complex** and signals market is unambiguously pricing crisis maturation, not escalation. **Defense ETF ITA $225.71 (+0.1% 1D, -4.1% 1M, -5.2% 3M)** = confirms broader defense rotation. Drivers: Q1 EPS miss ($6.44 vs $6.74E, $18B sales vs $18.3B), F-16 program delays, negative free cash flow (-$291M) — domestic operating issues + Iran tensions fading narrative reinforced by Trump-Xi summit + HEU door re-opening + defense-sector multiple compression from peak-crisis premium. **Per markets dossier E proposal: defense-sector → branch-1-kinetic edge proposed; this is leading indicator for Branch 1 (kinetic) probability — currently graph has 22-27% kinetic, defense bond complex is pricing closer to 15-18%**. Per markets dossier H reversibility map: Lockheed $480-500 (-4-8% further) if MOU signs by May 21; **Lockheed $620-680 (+19-30% snap-back) if Hormuz remains closed through June**. URA $53.31 (-1.9% 1D, +0.9% 1M, +3.9% 3M) — AI-fuel narrative wobbling; URA-ETF -5% over past few sessions = positioning unwind, not thesis-falsification. **Reversibility ASYMMETRIC**: -15% 1M LMT buys a lot of optionality on resumed kinetic phase if Trump returns from Beijing without deliverable and orders strikes. Combined with markets dossier H: 'biggest asymmetric trades are Lockheed (long if crisis persists), Frontline (long if VLCC rates stay >$200K), CF (long if Modi fertilizer-appeal compliance is weak) — all priced for Trump-Xi peace-scenario which is far from certain.' PRIOR (May 13): Markets dossier C7 read: **'BUY DEFENSE ON WAR' THESIS IS BROKEN AT THE STOCK LEVEL.** The Iran war should be a tailwind for defense; ITA -1.6% 1M / -2.7% 3M clearly underperforming despite war. **Why broken:** LMT Q1 2026 earnings April 23: EPS $6.44 vs $7.28 prior (-11.5%); sales FLAT YoY at $18bn (zero growth despite war demand); FREE CASH FLOW -$291M (turned negative). Supply-chain delays on F-35 + classified programs → fixed-cost-contract margin compression. **Trump admin's procurement strategy debates (price-control rhetoric vs production-acceleration) creates pricing-power uncertainty.** **Defense companies sit on fixed-price contracts that don't reprice when war demand surges — they just lose more money producing the same hardware faster. The right vehicles for the war trade are: fertilizer (CF +8.2%, Nutrien +4.3%), energy (XOM +3.5%, XLE +2.6%), uranium (URA +3.7%), and tankers — though tankers are now cycling (Frontline -3.4% on Evercore ISI downgrade for 2027-28 orderbook oversupply).** Defense underperforms because orderbook is sticky but cost base is not. **Reversibility:** crisis component (~10%) reverses on next earnings beat or major new contract; supply-chain/margin issues structural. WH Sit-Room May 11 weighing renewed strikes did NOT push defense sector materially higher = market sees the action as already-priced or expects it to favor energy/fertilizer over hardware OEMs.

active_triggers.condition: ITA tests $208 sustained on Branch 3 deepening (3+ sessions)
Lockheed bounces +10% in 5 sessions on Iran rejection scenario = falsification of May 5 pause durability (back to $620+)

recent_signals.headline: DEFENSE ROTATION REVERSAL DEEPENS — LOCKHEED $506.51 (-1.2% 1D, -18.8% 1M, -20.2% 3M); ITA $223.49 (+0.4% 1D, -3.6% 1M, -4.8% 3M); URA $55.18 (-1.9% 1D, +8.3% 1M). LMT decline DESPITE MAY 7 IRGC DESTROYER ATTACKS + MAY 8 SECOND TANKER DISABLING + CENTCOM 70-TANKER BLOCKADE SCALE + MOKHBER 'ATOMIC-BOMB' SPEECH. Markets choosing diplomatic-track narrative over trinary-regime operational reality. ~60% crisis-rotation reversal + ~40% Q1 2026 LMT earnings miss (EPS $6.44 vs $7.28 PY, $18B sales zero growth, F-35 supply-chain delays, Morningstar FV cut to $640 from $660). Either (a) right that deal signs by May 14, or (b) setup for sharp reversal if Iran rejects past May 21. **Falsification:** Iran rejects + IRGC non-symbolic kinetic action = LMT back to $620+ within 5 sessions.
sources: intel dossier Section E + market dossier C2
